disclaimer.en: Insurance coverage details are general estimates based on typical plan structures. Actual coverage varies by specific plan, employer group, and individual policy. We always verify your benefits before treatment and provide a detailed estimate. Our team will help you maximize your benefits.
disclaimer.es: Los detalles de cobertura de seguro son estimaciones generales basadas en estructuras de planes típicos. La cobertura real varía según el plan específico, grupo de empleador y póliza individual. Siempre verificamos sus beneficios antes del tratamiento y proporcionamos un estimado detallado. Nuestro equipo le ayudará a maximizar sus beneficios.

major.waitingPeriod: 12 months for new enrollees on many plans

deductible.note: Does not apply to preventive services

acceptedInsurance.notes: Delta Dental is the most common dental insurance in NC. As a PPO and Premier provider, our patients receive in-network rates.
MetLife is widely available through employer groups in the Greensboro area.
Common with many Greensboro-area employers. DPPO plans provide out-of-network coverage at reduced rates.
Aetna offers strong implant coverage on select PPO plans. Always verify implant benefits specifically.
We are in-network for most UHC dental PPO plans. Community Plan (Medicaid) may have different coverage structures.
BCBSNC is the dominant carrier in North Carolina. Many state employees and large employers use BCBS. Strong coverage for prosthodontic services.
Growing presence in the Greensboro market. Good coverage for basic and preventive services.
Humana Loyalty Plus plans increase annual maximums over time if you stay enrolled without claims. Good for long-term patients.

financingOptions.name: CareCredit

description.en: CareCredit is a healthcare credit card that offers promotional financing for dental procedures. Apply in our office or online in minutes. Special promotional periods available: 6, 12, 18, or 24 months with no interest if paid in full during the promotional period.
description.es: CareCredit es una tarjeta de crédito para atención médica que ofrece financiamiento promocional para procedimientos dentales. Solicite en nuestra oficina o en línea en minutos. Períodos promocionales especiales disponibles: 6, 12, 18 o 24 meses sin intereses si se paga en su totalidad durante el período promocional.

features: No interest if paid in full within 6-24 months
Apply online or in our office
Can be used for future dental and medical expenses
financingOptions.eligibility: Credit approval required. Promotional offers subject to credit approval and account terms.

interestRate.promotional: 0% for 6-24 months if paid in full
interestRate.standard: 26.99% APR if promotional balance not paid in full

financingOptions.name: LendingClub Patient Solutions

description.en: LendingClub Patient Solutions offers fixed-rate personal loans for dental treatment. Choose a repayment term that fits your budget — from 24 to 84 months. Know your exact monthly payment upfront with no surprises.
description.es: LendingClub Patient Solutions ofrece préstamos personales a tasa fija para tratamiento dental. Elija un plazo de pago que se ajuste a su presupuesto — de 24 a 84 meses. Conozca su pago mensual exacto desde el principio sin sorpresas.

features: Check your rate with no impact to credit score
financingOptions.eligibility: Credit approval required. Rates and terms vary by creditworthiness.

interestRate.note: Rate based on creditworthiness and loan term

financingOptions.name: In-House Payment Plans

description.en: We offer flexible in-house payment plans for qualifying patients. No credit check required. Spread the cost of your treatment over 3-12 months with no interest. We believe finances should never be a barrier to getting the dental care you need.
description.es: Ofrecemos planes de pago internos flexibles para pacientes que califiquen. No se requiere verificación de crédito. Distribuya el costo de su tratamiento en 3-12 meses sin intereses. Creemos que las finanzas nunca deben ser una barrera para obtener el cuidado dental que necesita.

financingOptions.eligibility: Available for established patients. Down payment may be required based on treatment total.

terms.autoPayDiscount: Additional 5% courtesy discount for auto-pay enrollment

en: Use your benefits before year-end — most plans reset January 1 and unused benefits don't roll over.
If you need extensive work, we can phase treatment across benefit years to maximize coverage.
Pre-authorization is recommended for major procedures to confirm coverage before treatment.
Don't let insurance dictate your treatment — we'll help you find a way to afford the best care.
HSA and FSA funds can be used for dental treatment and are a great way to pay with pre-tax dollars.
es: Use sus beneficios antes de fin de año — la mayoría de los planes se reinician el 1 de enero y los beneficios no utilizados no se acumulan.
Si necesita trabajo extenso, podemos dividir el tratamiento en varios años de beneficios para maximizar la cobertura.
Se recomienda la pre-autorización para procedimientos mayores para confirmar la cobertura antes del tratamiento.
No deje que el seguro dicte su tratamiento — le ayudaremos a encontrar una manera de pagar el mejor cuidado.
Los fondos HSA y FSA se pueden usar para tratamiento dental y son una excelente manera de pagar con dólares antes de impuestos.
